articles.title: Lanterman Act Rights Overview
articles.body: The Lanterman Act guarantees eligible Californians with developmental disabilities the right to services and supports necessary to live in the least restrictive, most integrated setting appropriate.
citations: CA Welfare & Institutions Code §4500 et seq.

templates.Sample IPP Meeting Request Email:
Subject: Request for IPP Meeting

Dear [Service Coordinator],

I am requesting an IPP meeting within 30 days under WIC §4646.5 to review and update my child's services.

Please provide available dates.

Sincerely,
[Parent Name]

articles.title: California IEP Timelines & Parent Rights
articles.body: California law requires school districts to provide an assessment plan within 15 calendar days of written referral. Assessments must generally be completed within 60 days, excluding long school breaks.

templates.Sample Assessment Request:
Subject: Written Request for Special Education Assessment

Dear [Principal/SELPA],

I am requesting a comprehensive special education assessment for my child under IDEA and CA Education Code §56321.

Please provide an assessment plan within 15 calendar days.

Sincerely,
[Parent Name]

articles.title: CalABLE Accounts (Updated for 2026)
articles.body: CalABLE allows eligible individuals whose disability began before age 46 (effective Jan 1, 2026) to save money without affecting SSI or Medi-Cal resource limits, subject to annual contribution limits.

templates.Sample ABLE Contribution Tracking Log:
Keep a spreadsheet tracking:
- Date of contribution
- Contributor
- Amount
- Total annual contributions
- Qualified disability expense category
